description: Style Notebelts crafted from finely woven leather, this brown Newhide belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe!Product DetailsBrown belt with stitch detailing, metallic studs and a hole design for durability and styleTang clasp and a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBrand name embossed on the loopMateriial and CareGenuine leatherUse a brass polish to maintain buckle shineUse a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
